caption: The video depicts a group of individuals in military attire, including uniforms and gear associated with the "U.S. COAST GUARD." One person wears a blue cap and dark blue uniform, another is in a tan and green camouflage uniform, a third wears a blue dress uniform with a peaked cap, and a fourth is equipped with a tactical helmet and gear. The setting appears to be indoors or within a structure with neutral-colored walls. Throughout the sequence, the camera cuts between close-up shots of these individuals. One person in camouflage is seen smiling while looking toward another individual, while the person in tactical gear maintains a serious expression. The person in the blue cap looks downward, and the individual in the blue dress uniform looks off-camera. There is no significant movement between the cuts, focusing instead on the alternating reactions and expressions of the personnel.
